sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: UBS downgrades Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) to neutral, raises its price target to $88
feed.summary: UBS has downgraded Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) to a neutral rating from a prior buy rating. Despite the downgrade, the firm increased its price target for Evergy shares to $88. The article does not provide reasoning for either the downgrade or the price target adjustment.

feed.title: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. Takes Position in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Jupiter Asset Management Ltd. recently purchased a new stake in Bank of America Corporation, acquiring 535,541 shares valued at approximately $27.6 million. This move is part of broader institutional investor activity, with several other hedge funds also adjusting their positions in BAC. The article highlights positive sentiments for Bank of America, including its commitment to private credit, a new no-fee rewards program, and strong wealth management recognition, alongside neutral and negative sentiments like rising investor attention and private credit risk concerns.

feed.title: 3 REITs Every Investor Should Know About
feed.summary: This article highlights three top REITs: Federal Realty Investment Trust, Realty Income, and Prologis, which are recommended for their strong dividend growth and long-term value. Federal Realty is noted for its industry-leading 58-year dividend increase streak, Realty Income for its stable monthly dividends and market presence across nine countries, and Prologis for its dominant position in logistics and its significant investments in data centers, yielding a high dividend growth rate.

feed.title: UBS Downgrades Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) to Neutral, Raises its Price Target to $88
feed.summary: UBS downgraded Evergy, Inc. (EVRG) to Neutral from Buy, increasing its price target to $88, citing limited upside after strong performance and in-line trading multiples reflecting 7-8% earnings growth. This decision comes despite other analysts like BofA raising their price targets and maintaining Buy ratings, and RBC Capital lowering its price target but keeping an Outperform rating due to updated capital plans across the utilities sector. The article also mentions Evergy's role in generating, transmitting, distributing, and selling electricity in the US.

feed.title: Stryker Corporation $SYK Shares Purchased by Fiera Capital Corp

Despite a director's sale of 250,000 shares, analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $426.94 and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.88 per share.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Co. to hold grand opening of 34th N.J. store today
authors: Greg Latza By Advance Local Express Desk Linda O’Brien
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Co. is holding the grand opening of its 34th New Jersey store in Mantua, Gloucester County, today, February 21, 2026. The new location will create about 15 jobs and offer outdoor and farm supplies. The grand opening coincides with the company's "Animal Days" savings event, which includes a "Farm Bash" with activities for customers and their leashed pets.

feed.title: Lucid (LCID) Showcases Innovation and Range Leadership in EV Market
feed.summary: Lucid Group Inc. (NASDAQ: LCID) recently showcased its Gravity SUV to European audiences in Berlin and demonstrated its range leadership in the EV market. The Lucid Air Grand Touring sedan achieved the longest driving range of any vehicle tested at the 2026 NAF Winter Test in Norway, covering 520 kilometers on a single charge. Despite these accomplishments, the article suggests that some AI stocks may offer greater promise for higher returns and limited downside risk compared to LCID.

feed.title: Ethereum Rout Triggers Nearly 19% One-Day Outflow from Invesco’s QETH ETF
feed.summary: The Invesco Galaxy Ethereum ETF (QETH) experienced a significant one-day outflow of $3.77 million on February 18, 2026, representing nearly 19% of its assets under management. This redemption signals a bearish shift in investor sentiment towards Ethereum, as its related asset (ETH-USD) has dropped by approximately 28.5% over the past three months and shows a "Strong Sell" technical signal. The substantial outflow suggests some investors are capitulating, highlighting the volatile nature of thematic crypto products.
